---
title: "Zerin Dong"
image: images/profile.PNG
about:
  template: trestles
  image-width: 200px
  links:
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: X
      href: https://x.com/zerin0729
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/zerin5577.bsky.social
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/zerin5577/
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: CV
      href: cv.pdf
---

## About Me

I am a 4th-year Ph.D. candidate in Economics at the University of California, Merced. My research studies how leadership, institutions, and incentives shape innovation and knowledge production. Prior to beginning my doctoral studies, I worked as a data analyst in the San Francisco Bay Area. I received a M.A. in Economics from the University of San Francisco. Outside of research, I enjoy running, reading, and spending time outdoors.

## Research Fields

- Applied Microeconomics
- Labor Economics
- Applied Econometrics

## Research Interests

- Economics of Science and Innovation
- Leadership


## Contact

Feel free to reach out via email at [zdong12@ucmerced.edu](mailto:zdong12@ucmerced.edu).
